## [09:04 - 09:34]

Now is this a short term thing like we're going to have like the biggest person in your market promoting, the biggest A player promoting for you next week? Absolutely not. This is a long term play, but it absolutely works and I've seen it work over and over. Everything about this game and especially everything about the joint venture game is a long term process. It doesn't happen overnight, but it does happen. It's all about building your positioning over time and building the momentum over time and it will absolutely work for you.
